All Implemented Interfaces:

  • Constructor Details

    • LightcorePackageImpl

      private LightcorePackageImpl()
      Creates an instance of the model Package, registered with EPackage.Registry by the package package URI value.

      Note: the correct way to create the package is via the static factory method init(), which also performs initialization of the package, or returns the registered package, if one already exists.

      See Also:
      • EPackage.Registry
      • LightcorePackage.eNS_URI
      • init()

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static LightcorePackage init()
      Creates, registers, and initializes the Package for this model, and for any others upon which it depends.

      This method is used to initialize LightcorePackage.eINSTANCE when that field is accessed. Clients should not invoke it directly. Instead, they should simply access that field to obtain the package.

      See Also:
      • LightcorePackage.eNS_URI
      • createPackageContents()
      • initializePackageContents()

    • createPackageContents

      public void createPackageContents()
      Creates the meta-model objects for the package. This method is guarded to have no affect on any invocation but its first.

    • initializePackageContents

      public void initializePackageContents()
      Complete the initialization of the package and its meta-model. This method is guarded to have no affect on any invocation but its first.
